prompt: I have an AI-powered code review tool and want to submit it to PitchWall. Walk me through the process.

assertions.description: Explains the submission process including where to submit (pitchwall.co/submit) and the manual review step
Describes the pricing tiers — free with 30+ day wait and a paid option around $99 for faster review
Mentions the disputed or uncertain backlink type and recommends verifying after listing goes live
Highlights the newsletter exposure to tens of thousands of subscribers as a key value of the platform

prompt: Is PitchWall worth it for SEO backlinks compared to other startup directories?

assertions.description: Notes the domain rating is around DR60 and discusses the backlink type uncertainty (dofollow claimed but disputed)
Compares PitchWall's backlink value with stronger alternatives like Fazier, Uneed, or other higher-DR dofollow directories
Recommends submitting to PitchWall for newsletter exposure but deprioritizing it for pure SEO purposes

prompt: What advertising options does PitchWall offer and what are the prices?

assertions.description: Lists multiple advertising products including newsletter sponsorship and a dedicated email option with their approximate prices
Mentions expected click or impression ranges for at least one advertising product
Notes that performance metrics are self-reported by PitchWall and suggests a test-first approach
